rationale: Pure documentation reorganization PR. Trims the 369-line CLAUDE.md to a 49-line agent pointer that links to README.md (player quick start), docs/IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md (implementation master plan), docs/DOCUMENTATION_STATUS.md (stale-doc tracker), docs/CLAUDE_ARCHIVED.md (historical session/GDD excerpt), and docs/DEAD_DRIFT_GDD_ARCHIVED.md (original pitch GDD). The historical content (game design, physics rules, narrative chapters, art/audio bible, technical architecture, NLP terminal pipeline, Bax dialog triggers) is preserved in the new docs/CLAUDE_ARCHIVED.md and docs/DEAD_DRIFT_GDD_ARCHIVED.md (moved from DEAD_DRIFT_GDD.md). New docs/DECISION_BRIEFS.md captures the May 2026 design decisions (CLAUDE B, GDD A, MAX_VELOCITY 280 with overdrive 420, soundtrack status table, README FULL rewrite) and lists pending open questions (Chapter theme order, Landing Beat 2 plan vs SPACE physics). README.md is fully rewritten as a player/dev feature overview. docs/IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md gets the MAX_VELOCITY=280 update and checkbox tracker. docs/SOUNDTRACK_PLAN.md gains an implementation status table. Pure markdown reorganization with no code changes; matches the PR title 'May 2026 improvement plan checkboxes + documentation status tracker'.
